Revenue $56.8 million, increase compared FY17.
income $10.5 million, increase compared FY17.
income diluted share $0.17 compared $0.10 FY17.
Adjusted EBITDA $21.2 million, increase compared FY17.
DRAPER, Utah, (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) HealthEquity, (NASDAQ:HQY) ("HealthEquity" "Company"), nation's largest health savings account ("HSA") non-bank custodian, today announced financial results third quarter ended October 2017.
"HealthEquity added 740,000 billion custodial assets since third quarter added 123,000 year's third quarter, including 14,000 First Interstate Bank," Kessler, President HealthEquity.

fully integrated investment platform continues industry custodial investment growth third quarter total invested custodial assets billion quarter
another strong quarterly performance record year-to-date results, narrowing guidance fiscal financial expectations around higher revenue forecast confirming adjusted EBITDA outlook."

Custodial revenue $22.1 million, increase compared FY17.
Interchange revenue $11.7 million, increase compared FY17.
income $10.5 million third quarter ended October 2017, compared million third quarter ended October 2016.
